SiteBot.title: AI Bot Settings
SiteBot.description: Configure web widget, API bot, and third-party platform bots.

webWidget.title: Web Widget Bot
webWidget.description: Embed a smart customer service chat window on your website
webWidget.embedInstruction: Add the following code to your web page to enable the smart widget
webWidget.asyncNote: The code is deeply optimized and supports asynchronous loading without affecting page performance.

apiBot.title: API Bot
apiBot.description: Supports OpenAI compatible interface for connecting various AI clients
apiBot.endpointNote: This interface is deeply compatible with the OpenAI protocol, supporting full messages array for seamless conversation memory.
apiBot.curlNote: Use the following command to test your API interface:
apiBot.enterpriseOnly: This feature is exclusive to the Enterprise Edition. Upgrade to Enterprise to enable API Bot for third-party system integration.

feishu.title: Lark Bot
feishu.description: Chat with the knowledge base in Lark through a self-built app
feishu.step1: Create a custom app in the Lark Open Platform
feishu.step3: Search and enable the 4 key permissions in 'Development Config' - 'Permissions'
feishu.step4: Enable 'Lark Events' mode in 'Events' and add 'Message Received v2.0' event
feishu.step5: Get App ID / Secret from 'Credentials & Basic Info' and fill them here
feishu.step6: Create a version and apply for online release in 'Version Management', effective after approval

dingtalk.title: DingTalk Bot
dingtalk.description: Chat with the knowledge base in DingTalk through a self-built app
dingtalk.step1: Create an 'Internal App' in DingTalk Open Platform and enable 'Bot' in 'Capabilities'
dingtalk.step2: Get Client ID and Client Secret from 'Credentials & Basic Info' and fill them here
dingtalk.step3: Add permissions in 'Permissions': Interactive Card Write and AI Card Stream Update
dingtalk.step4: Create a new 'AI Card' template in Card Platform, enable 'Streaming' and get Template ID
dingtalk.step5: Set message receiving mode to 'Stream' in 'Events & Callbacks'

wecom.title: WeCom Bot
wecom.description: Chat with the knowledge base in WeCom through a self-built app
wecom.hint: Please fill this URL in the WeCom self-built application 'Receive Messages' configuration.
wecom.step1: Go to 'App Management' - 'Self-Built' in WeCom Admin, click 'Create App'
wecom.step2: Get AgentId and Secret, fill them into the corresponding fields above
wecom.step3: In 'Receive Messages', set API receiving, fill in callback URL, Token and AES Key
wecom.step4: Get CorpID from 'My Enterprise' at the bottom

wecomKefu.title: WeCom Customer Service
wecomKefu.description: Connect to WeCom 'WeChat Customer Service' app, use Knowledge Base for auto-replies
wecomKefu.hint: Please fill this URL in the "Events and Message Receiving" configuration in the WeChat Customer Service management background.
wecomKefu.welcomePlaceholder: Enter welcome message, e.g., Hello! I am your AI assistant, how can I help you?
wecomKefu.step1: Go to 'App Management' - 'Self-Built' in WeCom Admin to create a self-built app for message relaying
wecomKefu.step2: Get the Secret of this self-built app (⚠️ Note: The old version of WeChat Customer Service's own Secret is deprecated)
wecomKefu.step3: In 'Set API Receiving' of the self-built app, fill in the callback URL and generate Token and AES Key
wecomKefu.step4: Go to 'App Management' - 'WeChat Customer Service', and 'Bind' your customer service account to the self-built app
wecomKefu.step5: Add your server's public IP in 'Trusted IP' of either the self-built app or WeChat Customer Service

wecomSmart.title: WeCom Smart Bot
wecomSmart.description: Chat with the knowledge base in WeCom through Smart Bot capability in group/direct chats
wecomSmart.step1: Go to 'Security & Management' - 'Management Tools' - 'Smart Bot' in WeCom Admin
wecomSmart.step2: Click 'Add Bot', select the recommended 'Long Connection' mode (no public callback needed)
wecomSmart.step3: Get Bot ID and Secret, fill them here and save to take effect

discord.title: Discord Bot
discord.description: Chat with the knowledge base in Discord through Discord App
